verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lonely years I had lived them, My life had no meaning'til I heard about Calvary. Then I knelt down in prayer. The Lord met me there now Jesus He's living in me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He's in my feet when I'm walking, In my tongue when I'm talking, In my eyes and now I can see. He's in the songs that I'm singing, In my heart His joy is ringing, Jesus Is Living In Me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Through the valleys, He has brought me, To the top of the mountain and over life's troubled sea Now I sing for His glory, songs that Tell the Great Story'cause Jesus Is Living In Me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yes, my Jesus Is Living In Me
